task.title: Add channel management methods to AgentRelay facade and Agent class

events.content: Kept channel and mute state inside agent-handle closures with internal mutators: Kept channel and mute state inside agent-handle closures with internal mutators

raw.question: Kept channel and mute state inside agent-handle closures with internal mutators
raw.chosen: Kept channel and mute state inside agent-handle closures with internal mutators
raw.reasoning: This preserves the existing facade shape while allowing broker-event synchronization without introducing a separate Agent class refactor.

retrospective.summary: Added channel subscribe/unsubscribe/mute/unmute methods to AgentRelay and Agent handles, plus broker-event state sync and channel management hooks in relay.ts
